rationale.R1.1: The artifact needs to clarify the specific contribution and how it differs from existing work, as the framing is somewhat vague.
rationale.R1.3: The claims about performance improvements need better alignment with the evidence provided in the results section.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty of SentiBridge needs clearer positioning relative to prior work, particularly Smith et al. (2022) and Liu et al. (2019).
rationale.R1.7: The artifact should include more comprehensive citations for key prior works in multilingual sentiment analysis.
